notes.en: Prepare fresh. Tween-20 at 0.05–0.1% is acceptable; adjust based on background signal.
notes.zh: 现配现用。Tween-20 终浓度 0.05–0.1% 均可，根据背景调整。

storage.notes: Prepare fresh weekly if Tween-20 precipitates

usage.en: Tris-buffered saline + Tween-20; standard blocking and washing buffer for Western blot.
usage.zh: 含 Tween-20 的 Tris 缓冲盐水，WB 标准封闭和洗涤缓冲液。
